title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.470 - Director and applicant placed under state department of elementary and secondary education relative to licenses
text:
265.470.  Director and applicant placed under state department of elementary and secondary education relative to licenses. — Insofar as issuance, revocation or suspension of any license hereunder is concerned, the director and the licensee or applicant for license shall come under the provisions of chapter 621.
(L. 1967 p. 371 § 20)
